nws_periods.name: Tonight
nws_periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 64. East wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws_periods.name: Sunday
nws_periods.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Sunny
nws_periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 10am. Some of the storms could be severe. Partly sunny, with a high near 84. Southeast wind 10 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws_periods.name: Sunday Night
nws_periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 1am. Mostly clear, with a low around 70. South wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.
